narrative:
Olmsted Falls-04-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 731 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.5 percentage points.
